question: Which statement best describes the pattern of CO2 emissions in Country N from 2000 to 2011?

options.A: Emissions steadily increased over the period.
options.B: Emissions steadily decreased over the period.
options.C: Emissions fluctuated without a consistent upward or downward trend.
options.D: Emissions remained nearly constant each year.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes the series appear increasing when it is actually fluctuating.
